A

AbstractFood - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin.model
Base implementation of Food that stores position and spawn weight.
AbstractFood(Point, int) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.AbstractFood
Creates a food item with the given position and spawn weight.
Apple - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.food
Standard food: grows the snake by one segment when eaten.
Apple(Point) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.food.Apple
Creates an apple at the given position.
applyEffect(Game) - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.food.Apple
 
applyEffect(Game) - Method in interface ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Food
Applies the food's effect to the game model.
applyEffect(Game) - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.food.Booster
 
applyEffect(Game) - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.food.Chili
 
applyEffect(Game) - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.food.Ice
 

B

Booster - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.food
Speed-increasing food: accelerates the snake by ~33% when eaten.
Booster(Point) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.food.Booster
Creates a booster at the given position.

C

Chili - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.food
Shrinking food: removes the last body segment of the snake when eaten.
Chili(Point) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.food.Chili
Creates a chili pepper at the given position.
CONST_SPEED - Static variable in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Game
Nanoseconds per tick at 1× speed; divide by the multiplier to get the actual interval.
createRandom(Point) - Static method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.FoodRegistry
Creates a random food item at the given position, with each type chosen by its spawn weight.
createSpecific(Class<? extends Food>, Point) - Static method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.FoodRegistry
Creates an instance of a specific food type at the given position.

D

Direction - Enum Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin.model
Cardinal directions for snake movement.
DOWN - Enum constant in enum class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Direction
Downward movement (increasing Y).

E

equals(Object) - Method in record class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Point
Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.

F

Food - Interface in ru.nsu.kiryushin.model
A food item that can be placed on the board and applies an effect when eaten.
FoodRegistry - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin.model
Discovers all concrete Food implementations at runtime and creates instances by weighted random selection.
FoodRegistry() - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.FoodRegistry
 

G

Game - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin.model
Core game model: holds the snake, food map, and win/lose logic.
Game(int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Game
Creates a game with the given board dimensions and win condition.
GameController - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin.controller
Mediates between the view and the Game model.
GameController() - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.controller.GameController
Creates a controller with default board parameters.
GameController(int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.controller.GameController
Creates a controller with the given board parameters.
GameState - Enum Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin.model
Possible states of a running game session.
GameView - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin.view
JavaFX FXML controller: renders the board on a Canvas and routes input through GameController.
GameView() - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.view.GameView
 
getAllFoodTypes() - Static method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.FoodRegistry
Returns an unmodifiable view of all discovered concrete food types.
getBody() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Snake
Returns a read-only view of the body ordered head-to-tail.
getColumns() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.controller.GameController
 
getColumns() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Game
Returns the board width in tiles.
getDirection() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Snake
Returns the current movement direction.
getFoodsOnBoard() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.controller.GameController
Returns the food currently on the board, mapping each cell to a stable food type name (the lowercase simple class name, e.g.
getFoodsOnBoard() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Game
Returns a read-only view of the current food items on the board, keyed by position.
getFoodTypeNames() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.controller.GameController
Returns the names of all known food types (lowercase simple class names).
getHead() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Snake
Returns the head position.
getLength() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Snake
Returns the number of body segments.
getPosition() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.AbstractFood
 
getPosition() - Method in interface ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Food
Returns the board position of this food item.
getRows() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.controller.GameController
 
getRows() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Game
Returns the board height in tiles.
getScore() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.controller.GameController
 
getSnake() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Game
Returns the snake.
getSnakeBody() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.controller.GameController
Returns the snake body ordered head-to-tail.
getSnakeDirection() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.controller.GameController
 
getSpawnWeight() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.AbstractFood
 
getSpawnWeight() - Method in interface ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Food
Returns the relative spawn weight for this food type.
getSpeed() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Game
Returns the timer interval in nanoseconds between game ticks.
getSpeedMultiplier() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.controller.GameController
 
getSpeedMultiplier() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Game
Returns the current speed multiplier (1.0 = normal, >1 = faster, <1 = slower).
getState() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.controller.GameController
 
getState() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Game
Returns the current game state.
getTickInterval() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.controller.GameController
 
grow() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Snake
Schedules the snake to grow by one segment on the next move() call.

H

handleInput(Direction) - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.controller.GameController
Routes a direction command to the snake.
handleInput(Direction) - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.view.GameView
Routes a direction command from external input (keyboard, Arduino) to the controller.
hashCode() - Method in record class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Point
Returns a hash code value for this object.

I

Ice - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.food
Speed-reducing food: slows the snake by ~33% when eaten.
Ice(Point) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.food.Ice
Creates an ice tile at the given position.
initialize() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.view.GameView
FXML lifecycle hook: loads food and snake textures, then starts the first game.

L

LEFT - Enum constant in enum class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Direction
Leftward movement (decreasing X).
LOSE - Enum constant in enum class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.GameState
Snake collided with a wall or itself.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.view.Main
Launches the JavaFX application.
Main - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin.view
JavaFX entry point: loads the FXML scene, detects Arduino, and lets the user choose the input method.
Main() - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.view.Main
 
move() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Snake
Advances the snake one cell in the current direction.

P

PLAYING - Enum constant in enum class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.GameState
Game is active and accepting input.
Point - Record Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin.model
Immutable grid coordinate.
Point(int, int) - Constructor for record class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Point
Creates an instance of a Point record class.

Q

queueDirection(Direction) - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Game
Queues a direction change.

R

restart() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.controller.GameController
Starts a new game, replacing the current one.
restartGame() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.view.GameView
FXML button handler: hides the game-over overlay and starts a fresh game.
RIGHT - Enum constant in enum class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Direction
Rightward movement (increasing X).
ru.nsu.kiryushin.controller - package ru.nsu.kiryushin.controller
 
ru.nsu.kiryushin.model - package ru.nsu.kiryushin.model

S

setDirection(Direction) - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Snake
Changes the movement direction, ignoring reversal into the opposite direction.
setSpeed(double) - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Game
Multiplies the current speed by the given coefficient, clamped to [0.5, 3.0].
setTitleUpdater(Consumer<String>) - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.view.GameView
Sets a callback the view uses to publish the score / speed HUD (typically wired to the primary Stage's title).
shrink() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Snake
Removes the tail segment immediately; does nothing when the snake is only one cell long.
Snake - Class in ru.nsu.kiryushin.model
Snake entity: body segments, movement, and growth logic.
Snake(Point) - Constructor for class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Snake
Creates a snake with a single segment at the given start position, facing right.
start(Stage) - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.view.Main
 

T

toString() - Method in record class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Point
Returns a string representation of this record class.

U

UP - Enum constant in enum class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Direction
Upward movement (decreasing Y).
update() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.controller.GameController
Advances one game tick.
update() - Method in class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Game
Advances one game tick: moves the snake, checks collisions, and checks the win condition.

V

valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Direction
Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.GameState
Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
values() - Static method in enum class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.Direction
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
values() - Static method in enum class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.GameState
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

W

WON - Enum constant in enum class ru.nsu.kiryushin.model.GameState
Win condition reached.

Returns the value of the x record component.
